feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >tall, thin, dressed for the desert in loose robe, stillsuit, and low boots. The…
entry.content: >tall, thin, dressed for the desert in loose robe, stillsuit, and low boots. The man's hood was thrown back, its veil hanging to one side, revealing long sandy hair, a sparse beard. The eyes were that fathomless blue-within-blue under thick brows. Remains of dark stains smudged his eye sockets.

entry.content: This is probably one of my most favorite games that I've ever played. I am so disappointed that it took me this long to discover it because it's like I have nobody to talk to about it at all. It's because it was on game pass for the Xbox that I even got the chance to play it. If you people have not played this game, you should play this game fair warning. It's just point and click and a lot of dialogue but like the endless amount of choices and varieties is quite overwhelming and the best way po

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: As the city’s MAID centers near capacity, the government has begun relocating al…
entry.content: As the city’s MAID centers near capacity, the government has begun relocating all registered patients to a derelict settlement far north of the city—an abandoned village now designated as a containment zone. The area is under constant aerial surveillance, its perimeter ringed with landmines to ensure no one leaves. Once a month, MAID dispatches "maintenance teams" to carry out the program’s final procedures and clear the population. A few hours ago, the MAID transport train dumped you here befor

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Apple is stupid for not using qualcomm ARM
entry.content: >No massive CPU R&D budget. >Less engineering risk with each generation. >Faster access to Qualcomm's latest manufacturing advances. >More resources for AI, software, Vision products, and services. >Easier scaling across different Mac price tiers. >Qualcomm gains Apple's volume, improving ARM chips for everyone. >Lower long-term costs by avoiding a massive in-house chip division with thousands of specialized engineers and expensive design tools. >Focus on Apple's strengths: software, UX, ecosyst

entry.title: /mu/ Music: why did she peak so early? Pure Heroine and Melodrama was released when she was …
entry.content: why did she peak so early? Pure Heroine and Melodrama was released when she was 16 and 19 respectively since then, all her works have been duds wtf happened during her 20s that made her decline in every single way?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: 4G and 5G to blame for low battery life
entry.content: For a long time I used one of those early "modern dumbphones", the battery life on idle was unironically around 1 month. When it broke and I started looking for a new one, I bought like 5 different ones trying to get one with similar battery life, but to no avail. Such a phone just doesn't seem to exist anymore, the absolute maximum is about 2 weeks no matter what phone you buy. At least that's what I thought. I started looking into why this is the case, and turns out it's because of 4G and 5G n

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Stuck between pretentious young purists who believe catchy love songs betray the…
entry.content: Stuck between pretentious young purists who believe catchy love songs betray their hardcore heritage and eager younger fans who believe catchy love songs fulfill their teenthrob destiny, these Warped Tour cover boys aren't terrible, but are they ever ordinary. Only their record company would claim that emotional vocals, dramatic dynamics, poppy-punky tempos, and not actually all that catchy tunes add up to "their own sound." They have some talent, they're cute, and they work hard. Thus they get

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Nickelback gets a goofy amount of hate, mostly because they became the punching …
entry.content: Nickelback gets a goofy amount of hate, mostly because they became the punching bag for "corporate rock" in the 2000s. But if you actually listen without the meme filter on, they're solid. Chad Kroeger has a distinctive raspy voice that works great for choruses, and they write ridiculously catchy hooks. It's straightforward,post-grunge/alterna tive rock.Some undeniable bangers like How You Remind Me. Peak early 2000s. Photograph - Nostalgia weaponized. Far Away, Rockstar, Animals, Savin' Me, Fig

entry.title: /int/ International: You now imagine a 30 year old American putting OSB on top of this and saying >"Y…
entry.content: You now imagine a 30 year old American putting OSB on top of this and saying >"Yeap, just like God intended it to be. Praise the Lord and the Holy Nation of Israel" and then he goes inside with his 5 kids, a dog and a big ass truck and a christian wife to have a meal where they praise the lord before eating. He goes to sleep. Wakes up in the morning, drives in the traffic jam for 2 hours to his workplace and earns 200k a year working a blue collar job. Americans dont suffer.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I like Neil Young, where to go from here?
entry.content: I like Neil for his weird mix of "uncool" authenticity and harsh noise. Should I listen to more folk? I tried Bob Dylan but it fucking sucked. I really love his electric "proto-grunge" stuff but some of the acoustic stuff is great too (I vastly prefer the more stripped down live recordings of those tho)

entry.title: /o/ Auto: The RUF is on fire!
entry.content: The new RUF B8 just got revealed. A mid engine platform powered by a 4.8L boxer V8 pushing over 1000HP and over 1000Nm. Manual only. RWD only. The only car that’s done something similar was a 1960s Porsche F1 car.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2987
entry.content: >Clankers Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /mu/ Music: The legendary Italian singer and pianist Peppino di Capri passed away at the age…
entry.content: The legendary Italian singer and pianist Peppino di Capri passed away at the age of 86 on July 11, 2026, on his native island of Capri. His management and family confirmed that he died at his villa, Villa Castiglione, following a long illness. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mDS xzLClpzU
